questions.question: Which bank’s research department released an assessment on PMJDY and reduced crimes?
questions.explanation: As per the State Bank of India’s economic research department, States with higher Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) account balances have seen a noticeable decline in crime. The department also observed that there is both statistically and economically significant drop in consumption of intoxicants such as alcohol and tobacco products in such states.

questions.question: Which Tennis player won his sixth Paris Masters title in 2021?
questions.explanation: Ace tennis player Novak Djokovic won his sixth Paris Masters title by defeating his Russian counterpart Daniil Medvedev with a 4-6 6-3 6-3 victory. Djokovic, the Serbian player, is guaranteed to secure the year-end world number one spot for a record seventh time. Two months ago, Medvedev denied Djokovic a record-breaking 21st Grand Slam men’s singles title.

questions.question: The “Economy GPS Index” is released by which organization?
questions.explanation: PHDCCI (PHD Chamber of Commerce and Industry) is a chamber established in 1905 and releases the “Economy GPS Index”. The latest Economy GPS Index for October 2021 stood as 131 as compared to 113.1 in September 2021. The chamber has stated that Indian economy has gained momentum on account of vaccinations, festival seasons and improvement in industry sentiments.

questions.question: “Tissue Culture Based Seed Potato Rules” has been approved by the cabinet of which Indian state?
questions.explanation: The Cabinet of Punjab has given approval to the “Punjab Tissue Culture Based Seed Potato Rules-2021”, which aims to develop Punjab as a standard potato seed center. This is expected to boost potato cultivation in the state. With these rules, Punjab will be the very first state in the country to have the facility of tissue culture-based certification. The cabinet also approved amending ‘Punjab Learning of Punjabi and Other Languages Act, 2008’ to implement Punjabi as a compulsory subject up to class 10.

questions.question: Issi saaneq, a dinosaur species which was recently modelled, which was found in which present-day region?
questions.explanation: An international team of researchers from Portugal, Denmark and Germany has performed a micro-CT scan of the previously excavated bones, to create digital 3D models. The finds belong to a new species, which has been named Issi saaneq. It means “coldbone” in Greenland’s Inuit language. The two-legged species lived about 214 million years ago in present-day Greenland. It was a medium-sized, long necked herbivore and a predecessor of the Sauropods (largest land animal).

questions.question: Which institution released the report titled “Mission 2070: A Green New Deal for a Net Zero India”?
questions.explanation: World Economic Forum released a research report titled “Mission 2070: A Green New Deal for a Net Zero India”, in collaboration with Kearney and Observer Research Foundation. In the latest research report, the World Economic Forum has highlighted that a Green New Deal for India could bring a $15 trillion economic opportunity by 2070. It also stated that India’s transition to net zero economy can create more than 50 million net new jobs.

questions.question: Which racing driver has won the Mexico City Grand Prix tournament?
questions.explanation: Red Bull’s Max Verstappen achieved a dominant win in the Mexico City Grand Prix to rise 19 points above Lewis Hamilton in the Formula One championship with four races remaining. Seven-time world champion Lewis Hamilton was at the second place for Mercedes. Red Bull’s Sergio Perez who was third, became the first Mexican to stand on his home podium. Max Verstappen is a 24-year-old Belgian-Dutch racing driver.

questions.question: Which city has been designated as a part of UNESCO Creative Cities Network (UCCN)?
questions.explanation: The United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization (UNESCO) designated Srinagar as a part of UNESCO Creative Cities Network (UCCN). After Mumbai, Chennai, Hyderabad, Varanasi and Jaipur, Srinagar is the sixth Indian city to achieve this honour. The capital city of Jammu and Kashmir has also entered the club of 295 creative cities network across the world.

questions.question: Manush Shah and Reeth Rishya, who were seen in the news are associated with which sports?
questions.explanation: India’s Manush Shah and T. Reeth Rishya bagged the men’s and women’s singles titles in the ITTF Ecuador International Open table tennis tournament. Reeth Rishya became the first Indian woman to win a singles crown in a pro-tour when she beat her compatriot Ankita Das. Manush, seeded sixth, defeated Juan Jesus Gomez of Mexico in the men’s final.

questions.question: Which social media platform has launched two cyber safety campaigns named ‘Safe Stree’ and ‘My Kanoon’?
questions.explanation: Instagram has launched two campaigns named ‘Safe Stree’ and ‘My Kanoon’ to provide online safety to young users. Instagram has partnered with a youth media and insights-company and a women’s rights and laws platform to launch ‘Safe Stree’. It aims to spread awareness about the safety features available on the platform. ‘My Kanoon’ will inform users about the legal rights and protection available to them.
